title: Demon Cycle Mod
description: Mod that was created to corrolate to the Demon Cycle Book Series
body:
This mod is designed to introduce aspects from the book series ; Demon Cycle by Peter V. Brett.

We do not claim to be the owners of the Demon Cycle series this is only a fan project.

This mod aims to add,
● paint and lacquer
● Wards
● Demons/Corelings
● Warder villager
● The Core as a dimension
● Warding Armour and weapons
● Spear

Credit;
KaylaDoesStuff; Coder and Publisher
True_Cosmicat; Artist, modeller and model animator
